{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "dsherret", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1609021?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/dsherret", "id": 1609021, "login": "dsherret", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE2MDkwMjE=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/dsherret", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48995", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "### Summary

A malicious `codeload.github.com` server can serve whatever tarball it wants and pnpm will install it regardless of the lockfile.

### Details

The lockfile does not store the hash of the dependencies from https://codeload.github.com

This means that if this server was compromised or a person's machine configuration was compromised, pnpm would download and install these dependencies.

### PoC

```sh
> pnpm -v     
10.28.2
```

Given the following package.json:

```json
{
  "dependencies": {
    "add": "git://github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep.git#b3eeb9b"
  }
}
```

This produces a lockfile like so:

```yaml
lockfileVersion: '9.0'

settings:
  autoInstallPeers: true
  excludeLinksFromLockfile: false

importers:

  .:
    dependencies:
      add:
        specifier: git://github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep.git#b3eeb9b
        version: https://codeload.github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep/tar.gz/b3eeb9b

packages:

  add@https://codeload.github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep/tar.gz/b3eeb9b:
    resolution: {tarball: https://codeload.github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep/tar.gz/b3eeb9b}
    version: 1.0.0

snapshots:

  add@https://codeload.github.com/dsherret/npm-git-dep/tar.gz/b3eeb9b: {}
```

Notice that there is no hash. The `b3eeb9b` is not sufficient because I can configure my machine to resolve a compromised tarball from that url (I tested it out and pnpm just installs it).

### Impact

Anyone relying on github git dependencies.
", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hg3w-7f8c-63hp", "html_url": "https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm/security/advisories/GHSA-hg3w-7f8c-63hp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hg3w-7f8c-63hp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48995"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-25T09:07:31Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1927579?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/zkochan/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/zkochan/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/zkochan/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/zkochan/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/zkochan", "id": 1927579, "login": "zkochan", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE5Mjc1Nzk=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/zkochan/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/zkochan/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/zkochan/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/zkochan/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/zkochan/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/zkochan", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Tarball hash of GitHub git dependencies is not stored in lockfile", "updated_at": "2026-05-28T14:13:43Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/pnpm/pnpm/security-advisories/GHSA-hg3w-7f8c-63hp", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "pnpm"}, "patched_versions": ">=10.33.4 <11.0.0", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<10.33.4"}, {"package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "pnpm"}, "patched_versions": ">=11.0.7", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">=11.0.0 <11.0.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Tarball hash of GitHub git dependencies is not stored in lockfile
